data.body: DONE. Closed 3-interface coverage gaps via gap analysis (G1/G2/G3/G5/G6); G4 link-sync deferred to story 25ae-92e6-2927-49b6 (unimplemented capability, linked discovered_from). External contracts: MCP sign_manifest/verify_signature now typed -> advertise canonical schemas + TOTAL-partition completeness guard (every advertised tool classified); 7 Jira bidirectional field round-trips (description ADF, blocked/cancelled status-label, label, parent, comment echo) chaining the real pure differs + a gated non-destructive live reconcile dry-run smoke (verified live, 38s). Internal contracts: MCP transition/claim/reopen concurrency-error-identity tests + lib reopen ConcurrencyError. Coverage: 61% in-process baseline recorded (docs/coverage.md w/ subprocess caveat) + conservative fail_under=50; behavior x interface matrix documented in docs/coverage.md. Strengthened tautological deps-parity assertion. Suite green (broad 1759 + integration 15); ruff clean. Two opus implementers + two opus reviewers (both APPROVE); independently verified suite+ruff+live bridge-probe. Commit bdcbbd26.
